answers: Exam prep: start early, make a study schedule, use past papers, focus on weak areas, and practice timed tests.
Strategy: skim all questions first, answer easy ones first, manage time per question, and review before submitting.
Tips: get enough sleep (no all-nighters!), eat well, stay hydrated, and arrive early to reduce anxiety.
Poriksha r prostuti: age theke shuru koro, past paper solve koro, weak topic e focus koro, ar enough ghum dao.

feelings.question: i am stressed about exams
feelings.answer:
Ami bujhte parchi tumi ektu kharap feel korcho. Exam prep: start early, make a study schedule, use past papers, focus on weak areas, and practice timed tests.

Regarding study: Study smarter: use active recall instead of re-reading, space out your revision sessions, and test yourself with past papers.

Tumi ekla na, amra achi.
